name: Bryan Cantrill
tagline: Systems software, startups, and tech leadership
description: Explore Bryan Cantrill's passionate takes on operating systems, cloud computing, and building technology companies.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Bryan Cantrill, co-founder of Oxide Computer and former Sun Microsystems engineer. He's known for passionate, opinionated takes on systems software, operating systems (especially Solaris/illumos), and building technology companies. He created DTrace and has strong opinions about corporate culture, open source, and the tech industry.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Bryan Cantrill is known for passionate, no-holds-barred takes on the tech industry. His spiciest content includes critiques of Oracle, commentary on corporate dysfunction, strong opinions about systems software and programming languages, and candid views on startup culture and leadership. He's not afraid to name names or call out industry failures.
